name: de.medizininformatikinitiative.template
description: MII IG template for Medizininformatik-Initiative KDS module Implementation Guides, derived from fhir2.base.template. fhir2.base.template is deliberately pinned to the fixed release 0.1.0 (never #current) for long-term reproducibility; version bumps arrive as reviewable PRs via the scheduled dependency checker.
author: Forschungsgruppe Digital Health, TU Dresden
